steps.title: Spot the reach advantage
steps.content: The passage says the artist can do something with her work "more broadly" because of Indigenous Photograph's reach, and that photography editors worldwide can search for Indigenous photographers through the organization. The blank names what that expanded platform enables her to do.

steps.title: Eliminate each choice
steps.content:
The blank needs to mean share or publicize her work to a broader audience. Substitute each choice:
  • Choice A — empty: to remove contents from — emptying her work makes no sense in this context. ✗
  • Choice B — promote: to publicize and raise awareness of — the organization's reach lets editors worldwide find her, which is exactly promoting her work to a broader audience. ✓
  • Choice C — alter: to change or modify — the passage is about reach and visibility, not changing the work itself. ✗
  • Choice D — discover: to find something for the first time — she already knows her own work; she needs to share it, not discover it. ✗
That matches choice B — B is correct.
